title: Fires Better MC
description: A Modpack that brings new features into Minecraft and still keeping it as Vanilla as possible.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3341f53e18934ddbd2dff697a0675d6c665ccff_0.webp)
[Discord ](https://discord.gg/Dc24wetZxu)

Fires Better MC is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience. Focused on improving performance while expanding exploration, this pack delivers smoother gameplay and optimized performance with minimal lag.


In addition to technical improvements, it introduces new biomes in the end and structures in every dimension enriching your world with endless adventures while maintaining the classic Minecraft charm. Perfect for players seeking a refined, optimized, and more immersive Minecraft experience without losing the essence of vanilla.

Sodium, lithium to preinstalled shaders everything is there.
A completly reworked end (better end) Costum structures (YUNGS Mods) quality of live mods like Better Third person etc.


And dont forget your vanilla experience is gonna be awesome!
